cards.title: Google Lets You Opt Out of AI Training
cards.body: Google updated privacy settings to train AI on more user data by default. Users can now opt out of this data usage in their privacy settings.

cards.title: Microsoft Cuts 4,800 Jobs Across Xbox, Sales
cards.body: Microsoft laid off 2.1% of its global workforce, with Xbox and commercial sales hit hardest. The cuts fuel concerns about AI replacing human jobs.

cards.title: Reddit Uses LLMs to Combat AI-Generated Spam
cards.body: Reddit is fighting AI spam with AI-powered solutions on its platform. The strategy addresses spam problems that LLMs themselves have largely created.

cards.title: Station F Accelerates European AI Startup Growth
cards.body: Paris-based Station F launches new F/ai accelerator program for promising AI startups. The hub positions itself as a stepping stone for Europe's hottest AI ventures.

cards.title: Amazon Stops Accepting New Mechanical Turk Customers
cards.body: Amazon's Mechanical Turk platform is closing to new customers. The move signals the end of an era for the crowdsourcing service.

cards.title: Google Commercial Imagines AI-Written Declaration
cards.body: Google's new ad reimagines the Declaration of Independence written with Workspace AI assistance. The campaign asks what the Founding Fathers could accomplish with modern AI tools.

cards.title: Midjourney Demands Studios Reveal AI Usage Details
cards.body: Midjourney seeks to compel three Hollywood studios to disclose how they use AI. The demand stems from an ongoing legal dispute with the studios.

cards.title: Alibaba Classifies Claude Code as High-Risk
cards.body: Alibaba has reportedly banned employees from using Anthropic's Claude Code. The company classified the tool as high-risk software.

cards.title: Mistral AI: The OpenAI Competitor Explained
cards.body: Mistral AI offers open-source AI models with significant funding since 2023. The company aims to democratize frontier AI for everyone.

cards.title: Essential AI Glossary for 2026
cards.body: A comprehensive guide to new AI terms and slang flooding the industry. The glossary covers the most important words and phrases to know.

cards.title: Top Chrome and Safari Browser Alternatives
cards.body: An overview of leading alternative browsers challenging Chrome and Safari dominance. The comparison includes emerging privacy-focused and feature-rich options.

cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Agents Progressing Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development efforts are not advancing as quickly as anticipated. The admission highlights slower-than-hoped progress on AI agents.

cards.title: Jersey Mike's IPO Shows AI Hype Peak
cards.body: Jersey Mike's sandwich shop included AI mentions in its IPO documents despite minimal relevance. The filing illustrates how pervasive AI marketing has become.

cards.title: Meta Quietly Launches AI Gaming App Pocket
cards.body: Meta released Pocket, an experimental app that generates interactive mini games from text prompts. Users can create and share AI-powered games directly.

cards.title: Anthropic Discusses Custom Chip with Samsung
cards.body: Anthropic is in talks with Samsung about developing a custom AI chip. The move follows OpenAI's recent chip announcement with Broadcom.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes Public Equity Share Plan
cards.body: Sam Altman proposed donating 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The proposal would let the public share AI boom gains.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Unit
cards.body: Microsoft committed $2.5 billion to a new AI deployment division. The move mirrors similar initiatives from Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenClaw Script Automates Dating Outreach
cards.body: Ben Guez built an automated dating script using OpenClaw and Claude Code. The tool reportedly generates many international dating prospects via Instagram.

cards.title: Indian Entrepreneur Bets $30M on AI Office Suite
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is building Neo, an AI alternative to Microsoft Office and Google Apps. The startup targets enterprise software with AI-powered features.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows AI Handheld Device Prototype
cards.body: SpaceX reportedly demonstrated a phone-like AI device to investors before going public. The prototype suggests SpaceX may expand into wireless technology.

cards.title: Google Training AI on Your Data Without Permission
cards.body: Google changed its privacy settings to train AI on more user data. Learn how to opt out of this practice.

cards.title: Reddit Uses LLMs to Fight AI-Generated Spam
cards.body: Reddit is deploying large language models to combat spam that LLMs themselves helped create. The platform fights fire with fire in the AI era.

cards.title: Station F Accelerates Europe's AI Startup Growth
cards.body: Paris-based Station F is launching a new F/ai accelerator program for promising AI startups. The hub aims to strengthen Europe's position in frontier AI development.

cards.title: Mistral AI: OpenAI's Growing French Competitor
cards.body: Mistral AI offers open-source AI models with ambitious funding since 2023. The startup aims to democratize frontier AI for everyone.

cards.title: AI Glossary: Essential Terms for 2026
cards.body: The AI boom has flooded the market with new terminology and jargon. This guide defines the most important AI words and phrases you'll encounter.

cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Agents Progressing Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development efforts aren't advancing as quickly as anticipated. The company faces delays in AI agent rollout.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Game Generator Pocket App
cards.body: Meta quietly released Pocket, an experimental AI app generating interactive mini-games from text prompts. Users can share their AI-created games with others.

cards.title: Anthropic Partners With Samsung on Custom AI Chip
cards.body: Anthropic is developing a custom AI chip with Samsung, joining the trend of major AI companies building their own hardware. This follows OpenAI's recent chip announcement.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes Public Equity Stake in Company
cards.body: Sam Altman suggested giving 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The proposal would let the public share in AI wealth creation.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Company
cards.body: Microsoft committed $2.5 billion to a new AI deployment group, joining Amazon and OpenAI in the infrastructure race. The company aims to accelerate enterprise AI adoption.

cards.title: Indian Tech Billionaire Builds AI Office Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is investing $30 million of his own money into Neo, an AI-powered alternative to Microsoft Office and Google Workspace. His new venture targets the enterprise software market.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows AI Device Prototype to Investors
cards.body: SpaceX reportedly demonstrated a handset-like AI device to investors before going public. The prototype signals SpaceX's interest in expanding into wireless communications.

cards.title: Achieving Operational Excellence With AI
cards.body: AI is transforming how companies approach operational efficiency beyond consumer chatbots. Modern frameworks combine machine learning with traditional business process management.

cards.title: Teaching AI to Run Power Turbines
cards.body: AI is moving beyond chatbots into critical infrastructure management like wind turbines. Machine learning optimizes safety and operational continuity in physical systems.

cards.title: Startup Tackles LLM Groupthink Problem
cards.body: Large language models suffer from conformist outputs that lack diversity in thinking. A new startup is developing solutions to break AI systems out of groupthink patterns.

cards.title: UK Regulator Warns of AI Arms Race in Finance
cards.body: Financial regulators flag an accelerating competition to deploy AI in financial services. The trend raises concerns about systemic risks and market stability.

cards.title: Anthropic's Secret Claude Tracker Revealed
cards.body: Users discovered Anthropic deployed tracking mechanisms on Claude despite anti-surveillance rhetoric. The revelation contradicts the company's privacy-focused positioning.

cards.title: Midjourney Demands Hollywood Studios Disclose AI Use
cards.body: Midjourney is suing three Hollywood studios and seeking disclosure of their AI usage practices. The legal action is part of an ongoing dispute over AI training data.

cards.title: Alibaba Classifies Claude Code as High-Risk
cards.body: Alibaba reportedly banned employees from using Anthropic's Claude Code tool. The Chinese tech giant views the AI coding assistant as a security concern.
